name: PHASE-47 W-1 meta-regression: reviewer wired to v6 (Phase-B citation discipline)
description: Stage W-1 meta-regression. Mirrors the S208/S340/S341 pattern — file/loader inspection only, no LLM calls, no real OS APIs. Proves the reviewer role -> _prompt_loader -> reviewer_v6 wiring that PHASE-47 W-1 introduces: (a) the role's declared system_prompt_id === 'reviewer_v6'; (b) the role source resolves its prompt via loadPrompt('reviewer_v6'); (c) reviewer_v6 carries the new citation-discipline anchors that target the PHASE-46 false-positive 404 BLOCKER (a Phase-B BLOCKER must cite the offending line; an absence-claim such as 'does not return 404' is invalid when the handler already returns 404 on the not-found path; a passing behavioral test is positive evidence); (d) RECALL is retained — the v5 missing-404 / this.changes BLOCKER discipline is still present (guard against deletion); (e) the protected first-500-char prefix is byte-identical to reviewer_v5 (preserves the S89/S90 mock prefix keys). HONEST SCOPE: this proves the intervention is installed + recall retained + prefix protected; it does NOT prove the real model's verdict is corrected (mock returns a fixed verdict) — that is the owner-gated real replay per the decision §4 item 6. W-1 is prompt + role-pointer only; §ARC frozen at 10.
